2/11/26: HO signed for House Roof. Contract states, \"Spicer Bros Construction will temporarily patch the missing shingle area until the roof can be replaced.  Spicer Bros will install the roof to the Fortified Standard.  Detached shed excluded.  Dumpster on left side of house in front of bar.  Double gates available for Equipter access.\"  HO is definitely one that is worried about cleanliness and proper workmanship.  Contract includes Ridge Vent, Fortified GAF Roof Deck Seam Tape, 3 cases of special 2-3/8 inch nails, and 2 pipe jacks.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: John Bianco Shannon Wootten I've just looked over thisjopb in full to see what we are and aren't responsible for however it seems that we could POTENTIALLY be responsible for quite a bit. The EPDM was nt installed correctly at all and did not even last 2 years on a 10 year warranty status. I'd like to know how we are gonna go about fixing this feesably as the salesman and subcontractor are no longer a part of our business. We have no one in house to perform this amount of work and this is a pure loss at this point. I personallyt have no answerson this we will have to remove all the plywood and EPDM as well as drip edge elements and shingles that are no longer made to acccomodate this.

comment_text: John Bianco Shannon Wootten I've just looked over thisjopb in full to see what we are and aren't responsible for however it seems that we could POTENTIALLY be responsible for quite a bit. The EPDM was nt installed correctly at all and did not even last 2 years on a 10 year warranty status. I'd like to know how we are gonna go about fixing this feesably as the salesman and subcontractor are no longer a part of our business. We have no one in house to perform this amount of work and this is a pure loss at this point. I personallyt have no answerson this we will have to remove all the plywood and EPDM as well as drip edge elements and shingles that are no longer made to acccomodate this.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: John Bianco Shannon Wootten I've just looked over thisjopb in full to see what we are and aren't responsible for however it seems that we could POTENTIALLY be responsible for quite a bit. The EPDM was nt installed correctly at all and did not even last 2 years on a 10 year warranty status. I'd like to know how we are gonna go about fixing this feesably as the salesman and subcontractor are no longer a part of our business. We have no one in house to perform this amount of work and this is a pure loss at this point. I personallyt have no answerson this we will have to remove all the plywood and EPDM as well as drip edge elements and shingles that are no longer made to acccomodate this.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: John Bianco Shannon Wootten I've just looked over thisjopb in full to see what we are and aren't responsible for however it seems that we could POTENTIALLY be responsible for quite a bit. The EPDM was nt installed correctly at all and did not even last 2 years on a 10 year warranty status. I'd like to know how we are gonna go about fixing this feesably as the salesman and subcontractor are no longer a part of our business. We have no one in house to perform this amount of work and this is a pure loss at this point. I personallyt have no answerson this we will have to remove all the plywood and EPDM as well as drip edge elements and shingles that are no longer made to acccomodate this.

comment_text: John Bianco Shannon Wootten I've just looked over thisjopb in full to see what we are and aren't responsible for however it seems that we could POTENTIALLY be responsible for quite a bit. The EPDM was nt installed correctly at all and did not even last 2 years on a 10 year warranty status. I'd like to know how we are gonna go about fixing this feesably as the salesman and subcontractor are no longer a part of our business. We have no one in house to perform this amount of work and this is a pure loss at this point. I personallyt have no answerson this we will have to remove all the plywood and EPDM as well as drip edge elements and shingles that are no longer made to acccomodate this.

comment_text: John Bianco Shannon Wootten I've just looked over thisjopb in full to see what we are and aren't responsible for however it seems that we could POTENTIALLY be responsible for quite a bit. The EPDM was nt installed correctly at all and did not even last 2 years on a 10 year warranty status. I'd like to know how we are gonna go about fixing this feesably as the salesman and subcontractor are no longer a part of our business. We have no one in house to perform this amount of work and this is a pure loss at this point. I personallyt have no answerson this we will have to remove all the plywood and EPDM as well as drip edge elements and shingles that are no longer made to acccomodate this.

comment_text: John Bianco Shannon Wootten I've just looked over thisjopb in full to see what we are and aren't responsible for however it seems that we could POTENTIALLY be responsible for quite a bit. The EPDM was nt installed correctly at all and did not even last 2 years on a 10 year warranty status. I'd like to know how we are gonna go about fixing this feesably as the salesman and subcontractor are no longer a part of our business. We have no one in house to perform this amount of work and this is a pure loss at this point. I personallyt have no answerson this we will have to remove all the plywood and EPDM as well as drip edge elements and shingles that are no longer made to acccomodate this.

comment_text: John Bianco Shannon Wootten I've just looked over thisjopb in full to see what we are and aren't responsible for however it seems that we could POTENTIALLY be responsible for quite a bit. The EPDM was nt installed correctly at all and did not even last 2 years on a 10 year warranty status. I'd like to know how we are gonna go about fixing this feesably as the salesman and subcontractor are no longer a part of our business. We have no one in house to perform this amount of work and this is a pure loss at this point. I personallyt have no answerson this we will have to remove all the plywood and EPDM as well as drip edge elements and shingles that are no longer made to acccomodate this.
